import asyncio, json, logging
logging.basicConfig\(level=logging.INFO, format='%\(asctime\)s [%\(levelname\)s] %\(name\)s: %\(message\)s'\)

from app.services import parallel_client

async def run\(\):
    result = await parallel_client.task\(
        question='Find the latest Paxos PYUSD attestation report PDF. The auditor is Withum \(WithumSmith+Brown\). Look for direct PDF download URLs from Withum site, Paxos blog posts, SEC filings, web archives, or any other source that has the actual PDF file. PYUSD is PayPal USD, a stablecoin issued by Paxos Trust Company.',
        fields={
            'pdf_url': 'Direct URL to the most recent PYUSD attestation PDF file',
            'attestation_date': 'Date of the most recent attestation report',
            'alternative_sources': 'Any other URLs where PYUSD attestation PDFs can be downloaded',
        },
        processor='core',
        poll_timeout=300,
    \)
    print\(json.dumps\(result, indent=2, default=str\)[:3000]\)

asyncio.run\(run\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

from firecrawl import Firecrawl
import json

client = Firecrawl\(api_key='fc-2b69281803904410a4c92436fa3a98a9'\)

# Fetch the Framer search index — it might catalog all pages including PDF URLs
result = client.scrape\(
    'https://framerusercontent.com/sites/3XxgTiMfDKU2yZKNfef9sl/searchIndex-djZtc01ptF72.json',
    formats=['markdown'],
\)

md = getattr\(result, 'markdown', ''\) or ''
print\(f'Search index length: {len\(md\)}'\)

# Look for PDF/attestation references
import re
pdf_refs = re.findall\(r'[^\\s"]+\\.pdf[^\\s"]*', md, re.IGNORECASE\)
print\(f'PDF refs: {pdf_refs[:20]}'\)

attest_refs = re.findall\(r'[^\\s"]+\(?:attestation|reserve|report\)[^\\s"]*', md, re.IGNORECASE\)
print\(f'Attestation refs: {attest_refs[:20]}'\)

# Show any relevant content
for line in md.split\('\\n'\):
    if any\(k in line.lower\(\) for k in ['pyusd', 'attestation', 'pdf', 'reserve', 'kpmg']\):
        print\(f'  {line.strip\(\)[:200]}'\)
PYEOF)
